title: Name
text: Name Name of the print job model. By convention Uniface print job model names start with P_ . Print job model names that end in an X, such as P_MSWINX , use enhanced printing features. The names of Uniface print job models must comply with the following naming conventions: Maximum length: 16 characters Valid characters: A-Z, 0-9, _ (underscore) Other rules: The first character must be a letter. Any restrictions of the DBMS used to store the PRATT.PRINTER entity apply. Uniface reserved words are not allowed. The name of the print job model should be meaningful to the end user. Related Links Print Job Models A print job model is a named collection of printer attributes that determine how and where Uniface forms or reports are printed, including details of the device type, margins, and so on. A print job model must be available before you can print. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
